review_text: Great park with cozy grass site and clean facilities. Peter, the receptionist, also really nice and let us even choose the site we wanted before check-in 🤗

Such a gem for us.  Peter rang and confirmed the configuration of beds for us a couple of days prior to our check-in. On opening the door to our villa we thought we had landed in paradise. The villa was spacious, clean with comfortable beds and a fully stocked kitchen. The pictures on booking were exactly what we got. Would highly recommend this beautiful park and friendly staff.

Great park, reasonably priced and good amenities. Has a nice resort style pool with slide for the kids. Across the road from patrolled beach and small boat hire. Customer service was great, worked out cheaper for us to book online. Restaurant out front with weekly deals. Not ideal for Big Rigs, we managed to find a great spot and were able to choose what suited us best. This was only due to limited number of bookings and arriving mid week. Wildlife in the park was awesome!
The room is nice and clean, perfect location next to the beach, the kids love it
Great spot, right on the Beachfront.  Friendly staff and plenty of room.

Clean restrooms convenient access to beach. Stay away from the restaurant, I could live with the $26.50 for fish and chips for two and the $6.50 for a liter of tonic water but the $2.50 for approximately 50ml of ketchup to put fries is ridiculous!
Great for family getaways
Superschöner Platz direkt zwischen Urwald und Strand. Besuch von Cassowaries und Wallabies inklusive!
Lovely place to stay

Stayed 3 days in our caravan and the park is lovely. Very tropical and clean and well cared for. The pool is gorgeous and the amenities clean and well equipped. Joe in reception was awesome. Only cons for us was,
1. the site, whilst very pretty and totally convenient to the amenities and pool, was very small. Had it been busy season with all sites full we could not have parked our car once unhitched. The sites are fine for camper vans and motor homes but not great for caravans in the busy season. Luckily it was fairly quiet, but we did note we were the only caravan on site and all others were campers and motor homes, except one other up the back in a larger site.
2. some confusion with rates for additional nights when extending the stay, but all good. The cabins looked very nice from what we could see and the restaurant, Tuskers, was fantastic. Great food and atmosphere and very well priced. All up a lovely stay, until we got new neighbours who smoked a lot, and we couldn’t sit outside. Maybe there should be smokers sites and non smokers sites in van parks?

Amazing and friendly!
We loved our stay. We also saw a wallaby and a few cassowary. Really cool.

Toller Holidaypark. Wir kamen ohne Reservierung und konnten uns unseren Platz aussuchen! Der Checkin war unkompliziert und das Team vor Ort war super freundlich, gab tolle Tipps und die Einrichtungen wie Laundry, Duschen und Campküche waren sauber und gut gepflegt. Haben 2 mal die Kasuare gesehen, die dort immer wieder mal durchlaufen

Mooie groene en ruime plaatsen voor campers. Veel bomen en struiken en ‘s ochtend zijn we verrast door een kasawari met 3 baby's die op het park liepen. Keuken en douchegelegenheden waren zeer netjes. En de locatie is geweldig; naast het prachtige strand, waar we in het afgezette gedeelte konden zwemmen!

Elvira and her team were always very accommodating and went over and beyond to assist us in our week long stay. Recently,  after checking out, I realised - when we were an hour into our journey - to our next accommodation, that unfortunately I had left a significant amount of coinage on the bedside table. My wife messaged Elvira and told her of my plight. Without hesitation-Elvira transferred the money. I couldn’t be more grateful. Thank you Big 4 Tasman Holiday Parks South Mission Beach. 💜
The park is located at an ideal location at South Mission Beach ||The room was clean and tidy .||Staff are friendly and service was prompt .

Beautiful tropical park with lovely hosts. The pool is great, kids didn't want to get out. The cafe /takeaway is handy and delicious and the lady there was a hit with our three boys. Beach directly opposite was a lovely backdrop.

Amazing location! Stayed in the beach front villas which have a spectacular view. Entire area is spotlessly clean, and very well maintained. Special mention to Elvira and the staff who really made the stay even more enjoyable. Will definitely stay here again!
Clean, friendly staff, cabins are spacious

Amazing campsite with heaps to offer. We stayed in a cabin it clean, tidy and really affordable.

The staff were incredibly lovely with a great dinner and drinks spot onsite. The campsite was really well maintained and the netted swimming spot was great.

I would really recommend for a great experience.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Fantastic caravan park! Super clean, and the shady pool and playground were excellent for the kids. The amenities are top-notch. Staff is extremely friendly and welcoming. WiFi good. Washing machines cost $6 per use, very handy. Plus, the short walking distance to the beach was a huge bonus. Highly recommended!

Sehr sauberer und super am Meer gelegener Caravan Park. Personal ist super freundlich, der Stellplatz ist top, absolut zu empfehlen. Im Meer ist eine Schutzanlage vor den Quallen installiert, somit kann man sicher im Meer baden.
Wonderful, peaceful campsite. Ideal for a campervan. Right next to the beach with a swimming lagoon. Swimming pool and cafe on site. Good sized pitches. Pete in the office very helpful too!

Wir waren für zwei Nächte hier. Der Empfang war sehr freundlich und wir bekamen viele Infos zu umliegenden Atraktionen.
Der Camping war extrem suber (der beste den wir bis jetzt auf unserer Reise hatten.

Schöne Wildtiere im Camping (Walabis, Casowary und viele andere Vogelarten.

Camping direkt am Strand, South Mission Beach, der perfekt für Spaziergänge, Running geeignet ist.

Sonneaufgang ist wunderschön!

Wir kommen gerne wieder wenn wir auf der Durchreise sind. 👍🏽👍🏽

Mooie en ruime plaatsen voor motorhome. Veel bomen en struiken en bij binnenkomst duidelijke uitleg over war te doen als vader casuaris met de 3 baby's op het park liepen. Helaas niet gezien wel 3 wat grotere minder kleurrijke casuaris baby's gezien. Mooi zwembad en vlakbij een groot strand.

fab park, right on a great beach, good restaurant and lovely staff, bogs amnd showers super clean....till I went in
This is my pathetic attempt at humour, my body made them dirty....

We went in a cabin, with others in the family in their camper. This is a lovely beachfront site. Cabin was great. Campsite ok except for concrete hardstanding area which was easy to trip over in the dark and stopped the camper step going down. Lots for the kids to do, and the roaming cassowaries and babies were great

We had a 3 night booking here a few weeks ago. The park is in a great location, the sites were great, the facilities were all clean, and staff were all friendly. There was a Cassowary (and chicks) roaming around when we were there, which was initially exciting. It ended up kicking the door of our (brand new) caravan a few times while we were in it, and we decided to leave after 1 night. Be cautious / prepared to cover up if you have a dark reflective vehicle or caravan. The door of our van is the only reflective part, and it got kicked…hard. We ended up putting a sheet over the door afterwards. We came in with no idea about any of this, and obviously would have sorted it if we had known. The staff did eye check our set up from the desk at check in and confirmed it was fine. We realistically needed more advice on this risk upfront, a more thorough check, or at least a rundown to check it all out ourselves…

Park is nice but seriously the sites are ridiculously small and they keep piling in vans. if you have a full size van, it’s an absolute joke trying to get in and out of your site. Nowhere to park your car without almost touching the neighbors. And if it hasn’t already happened a kid will get run over as you have no chance of spotting them coming out between cars before it’s too late.
Best spot ever. Right on a great beach. Good for families. Refurbished cabins.
Had awesome time at the tasman. They even let me have a spot for my boat. We hired a cabin and was very nice and clean and comfortable beds.  Will come back as soon as we can.

Lovely spot on Mission Beach.  Quiet, clean facilities, pool area   Nearest shops Woolworths  about 7.1 km.   Main town 10 km Had a visiting  food stall the night I arrived Tuesday and has some other events other nights  Happy hour beer and wine Wednesday

We arrived shortly before closing time and were assigned a campsite that was already occupied; This happened once again. However, we found a spot and settled in very quickly. The facilities were spotless clean and the camp kitchen amazing. Cassowaries can be seen occasionally on the property.
Lovely location, great facilities, well maintained
Some sites are a bit hard to get into (caravan) but great park. Great restaurant/takeaway out the front.

The location is just magical, a quiet stroll to the beach. Close to the Mission Beach shopping strip, unfortunately the road works were a nuisance.
The staff are very friendly & helpful.
The sites are quite small for motorhomes, so it was a bit squeezy.
The downside was the cleanliness of the amenities & camp kitchen.
The toilets & showers were clean however the fans were really gross. Rusty, with clumps of wet dust.
Also the camp kitchen was pretty gross too. We went to check out the bbqs & the first thing I noticed was the floor & front cabinets. The carpet squares were stuck to the floor & clearly hadn’t been cleaned in a very long while. This area should be spotless, it’s where food is prepared & eaten. Not acceptable.
The best location in South Mission Beach. Right on the water and close to everything. Rooms are spacious and clean. Staff are very helpful
Friendly staff :). Sites are nice...fantastic kitchen block! Its on the mission bay south spot so close to a good walking track...and a quickish drive to the main centre :)

My hubby and I just spent 2 nights in Mission Beach, this park is beautiful, room was nice and clean, great pool, food from the cafe was delicious and right across from the beach, would definitely come back again
We enjoy our stay
A lovely park with cafe, pool & clean amenities.  Most staff friendly. Loved the Cassowaries walking around.  Can swim at beach & handy to other places to explore.  We will be back. Thank you.
Not happy about many campers turning up very late and setting up. Park food is promoted as "the best" but actually very ordinary

The best campsite I booked on my month-long trip on the eastcoast of Australia. Wonderful nature, curious cassowaries, modern facilites, close to the beach and very friendly and helpful staff... all that characterizes this awesome holiday park.
I would love to come back.

AMAZING spot and it’s a must if you’re in the cairns/port Douglas area. Walk straight out onto the beach and the pool area was immaculate. If you have kids this is the best place to be.
The caravan sites are VERY tight to get into and it’s quite packed in.

This park is right on south mission beach. They have a cafe but only open 5 days a week. Food was good and fairly priced. On the beach there is a boat and jet ski rental place which is fairly priced for the location and what you get.

The only negative comment I would make is the park really packs people in and there is VERY little room to park your car. The roads are not very wide and some folk had to park their cars in vacant sites until vans turned up to occupy them. This is a pretty common thing though, and folk managed to work around it. Just remember if you have a long van it is going to be a tight fit getting through some of the park roads. Worth it though? As the park is directly opposite Dunk island.
This place is full of character! Love the karaoke night  and the cassowary walking around enjoying breakfast visits at the different sites!

i rarely write review. very nice staff this place is beautiful, clean and spacious amenities. affordable prices in popular place with only 100 metres away beach access. Cassowary and her babies visited us in the afternoon.  we were so happy here travelling from victoria on 4wd rooftop tent stayed alot of caravan park. this place is by far our favourite. be happy, spend the night here!

I had a wonderful stay at the Tasman Holiday Parks. The bathroom and kitchen area was very clean. The food from the restaurant was cheap and delicious. I recommend the chicken tortilla. The staff was also very friendly! And had a nice short swim in the swimming pool.
Small sites but a great location
Great place, staff very accommodating, great facilities, highly recommend. A great cafe with all the facilities.
Lovely park to stay in. Right on the beach. Staff were welcoming and very helpful. Ammenities were clean and showers hot. Looking forward to returning.
Exceptional. Cassowary heaven, great food great staff with a good sense of humour!  (that’s getting hard to find)

My husband and I spent a weekend here with our daughter, her husband and 3 kids. We stayed in a fully self contained cabin. They brought their caravan. I rate this as one of the best places to stay in Far North Queensland. Well-priced for a family budget, spotless facilities, lovely staff made us feel very welcome, and right across the road from a beautiful beach and island views. Highly recommend.
Villa was clean and well maintained, park was very clean and tidy, staff was extremely friendly and helpful! Will definitely be staying there again soon
Deenbettrr and seen worse. Adequate.

South Mission beach just a little quieter...great venue for the park,close to the beach to watch an amazing sunrise.
Good sized caravan spots with slabs.
Clean modern amenities however I thought the days of keys to doors were over 🤦
A great choice for us

Amazing experience.  From the moment we arrived.  Felt welcomed,  and the management were so accommodating.  Really relaxed approach.  Gorgeous location.  Have been traveling for three weeks,  6 different camps between Brisbane and South Mission Beach and this would rate one of the best! Thanks team.....Vic and Helen
The best atmosphere and location 👌
This is a great spot overlooking the water. Has everything including a bbq on the deck.
This haas to be one of the best-managed caravan parks we've been to. Top location and all you need for a great holiday.

Honestly this place is super clean, excellent staff and amazing location. The pool area was amazing too. We got a ensuite room for 4 and it  didn't feel cramped. Very clean and looked recently renovated.

A total gem, sitting in the best position so close to the beach. Well maintained and immaculate condition, its the best get away place. All the staff are amazing, from reception to the maintenance guy to the ladies who clean the rooms, friendly, happy and proffessional.
Very enjoyable stay in van Park with power. Would recommend staying for a few days or longer.
Lovely weekend customer service is excellent food at the cafe

We absolutely loved our stay at Tasman Parks South Mission Beach. We stayed in a beachfront villa and it was so comfortable, and well positioned on the esplanade to highlight that beach view. ||The villa provided sufficient facilities inside to cook our own meals and the fridge was of a decent size also. ||We were pleased with the parks facilities, the laundromat which was $6 a load for washing or drying, the kids playground was well laid out and tidy, and the pool area was well spaced out and clean. Such a gorgeous well maintained park and loved the lush gardens, particularly the lipstick palms. ||The service from the staff was great and accommodating from check in to check out. |We had coffee from the cafe one morning, which was ok and the service a little slow. We enjoyed seeing the local cassowaries and their chicks roam freely throughout the park even as close to the beachfront villas! ||It was such an amazing stay, we will be back again in the future and will highly recommend to anyone visiting the area!

After travelling 23 times around Australia we always came back to this place...not only because it is a wonderful spot with a lot of nature...the stuff are the best friendly and with a big smile.
This time we saw the first time a cassowary....one of ours Highlights.
Great spot to stay at mission beach, the family loved it
Wonderful park, opposite beach, great pool. Very friendly staff and a Cafe on-site. Clean and well maintained amenities blocks, great camp kitchen. Would highly recommend 👌
What a great park, easy access to park our van, great site, great facilities and location. Friendly staff, thank you.

Superb place - we had a Campervan powered pitch for two nights recently and cannot fault anything.  The site and facilities were immaculate, top notch attention to detail and the level of care was evident, even with fresh flowers/greenery in the washrooms.  Absolute best kitchen facilities and area, we have stayed at many and whilst many are great, this stood out.  The pool was fantastic, very clean, interesting features complete with a short water slide.  The owners were super welcoming  and could not do enough for us, they also fixed our broken awning. It was the epitome of service with a smile.😀
Being virtually on the beach with a stinger net opposite was the perfect spot.
Lovely park. Good clean amenities and very freindly and helpful staff.

A Perfect Stay at South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park!

Our stay at South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park was absolutely fantastic! From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the incredibly friendly and helpful staff, who truly went above and beyond to make us feel at home.

The park itself is one of the cleanest and best-maintained we’ve ever visited. The lush green grass and beautifully kept gardens create a relaxing and inviting atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, and the attention to detail in maintaining the park is outstanding.

The pool was crystal clear and well-kept, providing the perfect spot to cool off. The pool slide and playground were a huge hit with the kids, keeping them entertained for hours.

A real highlight of our stay was the incredible cassowaries and their chicks wandering through the park – a truly unforgettable experience and a testament to the park’s stunning natural surroundings.

If you’re looking for a clean, well-maintained, family-friendly holiday park with exceptional service and a beautiful setting, South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park is the place to go.

Our stay at South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park was absolutely fantastic! From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the incredibly friendly and helpful staff, who truly went above and beyond to make us feel at home.||The park itself is one of the cleanest and best-maintained we’ve ever visited. The lush green grass and beautifully kept gardens create a relaxing and inviting atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, and the attention to detail in maintaining the park is outstanding.||The pool was crystal clear and well-kept, providing the perfect spot to cool off. The pool slide and playground were a huge hit with the kids, keeping them entertained for hours.||A real highlight of our stay was the incredible cassowaries and their chicks wandering through the park – a truly unforgettable experience and a testament to the park’s stunning natural surroundings.||If you’re looking for a clean, well-maintained, family-friendly holiday park with exceptional service and a beautiful setting, South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park is the place to go. We can’t wait to return!

Von Brisbane kommend der absolut schönste Camping Platz. Liebevoll tropisch angelegt mit Wallabies und Casuaren. Tolle Wanderwege in der Nähe. Pool und Stingernetz im Meer. Hatten leider nur einen Tag Zeit. Hier sollte man definitiv mehr Zeit einplanen. Vielen Dank an das Team vom Platz, es war großartig.
This place is the best. Clean, friendly, and perfect for kids. Loved every moment. We will definitely be back.

Mit Abstand der beste campground seit wir in Australien sind... Das ist seit 5 Monaten und ca. 50 anderen Campingplätzen! Die Natur rundherum, die Einrichtungen... Pool, TV Raum, Camp kitchen, laundry, Cafe und vor allem WCs und Duschen sind nirgendwo anders soooo rein und neu gewesen. Es gab keine einzige! schmutzige Fliese oder ein schmutziges WC! Als Höhepunkt kommt dann noch der Kasuar mit seinen Küken auf Besuch - ein wirklich wunderschöner Aufenthalt!

Absolutely the Best!

We absolutely love staying at Tasman Holiday Park – South Mission Beach! It’s our go-to spot for nearly every family vacation. The park is always clean, the facilities are top-notch, and the pool area is perfect—featuring a fun slide and a shady, shallow pool for little ones. The staff at reception are incredibly welcoming, making us feel right at home every time.

Thank you for consistently providing such an amazing experience. We can’t wait to come back!
Wonderful place
Very good

Arrived with our campervan and had a lovely welcome with live music and some awesome fish and chips. Kids loved the swimming pool, especially the slide. And the play park. That all with the beach with great swimming area right on your door step. Campsite itself is convenient, clean and nice staff. Thanks for the great but short stay.

The park manager is awesome & it's a great place to stay.
Clean amenities & nice pool.

Recently stayed here for Christmas and the staff were so friendly and welcoming. Beautiful place to stay with family or as a couple. Bathrooms and camp site were very clean also.
Highly recommend this caravan park.
Modern facilities, very clean, quiet, close to the very nice beach. One of my favourite parks I’ve stayed
We spent 1 night at mission beach and really enjoyed the campsite. Clean, tidy and very comfortable. We'd definitely stay again
Fabulous spot...definately worth a 2-3 night stay.
100% put this place on the bucket list, best service best atmosphere, best location
We really enjoyed our stay at Mission Beach in our camper.  The location and surrounding area was awesome.  The amenities were nice and we felt safe staying there.  We would camp again here.
If you want to leave your bissy live behind, BIG4 Tasman caravan park is the place for you.
Nice park with reasonable amenities, just a bit too cramped to get a higher rating
We’ll be back.  One of the best parks we have stayed and we have stayed at a lot.  In top 5
5 star caravan park, very clean and tidy. Friendly staff very well maintained caravan park.

We stayed at the park last week we had a caravan not a cabin, we intended to stay 4 days but stayed a week as it's such a great place to stay,   the hosts were incredibly friendly, very neat park opposite the beautiful beach, great pool & you can hire a boat to go fishing or just around the islands.  I can't speak highly enough of this place & will definitely return
Had a relaxing 3 night stay in our campervan. Reasonably priced and amenities and staff excellent- nice site and trees between each. Pool and on-site cafe excellent- highly recommended

Staff were inviting and friendly, the park and amenities are well kept, impeccably clean and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The cafe onsite is excellent value and the food was delicious. We will definitely be back. Thankyou!

We stayed at beach villa 18 for 3 nights, the location is awesome overlooking beach, road access and the tiny house was clean and tidy. The pool is awesome but very cold. The water feature and crocodile are a cool touch. The restaurant is convenient and food is huge. The park was absolutely packed when we were there however it was still quiet and not roudy at night.. Cons- outside bbq very hard to use it’s got no temp control and is too hot, burning everything, 3 rinai split systems in our cabin, lounge room one didn’t blow out cool air. Kids bedroom one the fan is worn out and very noisy. Wifi doesn’t work in this cabin it’s too far away but there’s phone service anyway. Cutlery was broken and frypan completely un-usable so we had to go buy one. Overall this is a great place to stay as a family

Ein sehr gut aufgebauter Holiday Park. Hier wird auf Sauberkeit geachtet und Mitarbeiter bemühen sich, den Urlaub der Gäste so angenehm wie möglich zu gestalten. Einer der Besten, die ich in Australien besucht habe.
Lose to the beach and walk
We staan op de camping met een camperbus. Toiletten en douches zijn netjes en schoon. De locatie is mooi, alleen werkt het weer niet mee.

Fantastic 2 night stay in 2brdm beach front cabin. Plenty of room for our family of 4. Queen bed in one room and bunk beds in other. 1 large bathroom and well equipped kitchen. Unfortunately no washing machine but we were aware of this and there is a laundry onsite. Bbq on front verandah very handy. Roof fan on verandah a nice touch. Location is amazing, 40 steps to the beach from our cabin! Could watch the beautiful sunrises in the morning. Had dinner at the onsite Cafe one night, was nice.
This is a rare place you can swim in the beach in FNQ! Highly recommended, especially the beach front cabins.
It is well placed for the beach, great views, catch up with friends

Excellent Park Easily Accessible carvan sites.|Managers Elvira and Partner were eccellent and so helpfull.|The Park staff were all excellent.|The Beach was fabulous for swimming and very long walks.|There were plenty of things to do and some of the restaurants were great as well the spicy Thai a standout
Great place to relax and enjoy sunrise and sunset, our first trip in our caravan had stay before in a cabin put stay in our was so much more. Thank you we will back over and over again.

Awesome spot ! Right in front of the beach and near the amazing Kennedy track.
The park is beautiful, I stayed in an ensuite cabin which had all I needed ! I did not want to leave this place :-)
The staff is very friendly and they also have a nice cafe with yummy food. I will definitely come back !
Beautiful spot, great waterslide. Good facilities in the camp kitchen, and reasonable priced.
Unreal spot...

Enjoyed a wonderful two night stay recently with my young family.  We were very impressed with the location, facilities and beautiful surroundings.  Would love to have stayed longer (can't wait to return).  Best holiday park we have stayed in so far (not just in QLD but all of Australia). Comfortable 2 bedroom cabin, would love to book the beach front (accessible cabin) next time, as the more room the better with young kids.  Thank you for having us, we couldn't speak more highly about this accommodation 😊👌
Great rooms  friendly staff, great location.  What more could you ask for.
Very quiet. Great location and sites, but a bit wet at the moment.

Haven't stayed there as yet, though I can say that the location is great.
Food is great also, including staff.
When doing work at sth Mbch we call in there for lunch.
Great atmosphere guys.

Super gepflegter und sauberer Campingplatz. Waren für eine Nacht dort und konnten uns den Stellplatz selbst aussuchen. Das Personal war super freundlich. Tolle Lage direkt am Strand. Hatten sogar Glück und haben einen Kasuar sehen können.
Lovely place and staff
Beautiful beach and great camp parc with a great lowkey vibe!
Schöner Campingplatz. Sehr nettes Personal. Konnten uns unseren Stellplatz selbst aussuchen. Strand direkt gegenüber. Toller Imbiss mit leckerer Pizza und Pommes direkt am Campingplatz.

Stopped here for one night when we couldn't face pitching our tent in the rain. Stayed in the basic 'shack' cabin and it was perfect for us. The bed was so comfy. We had WiFi, a TV & a comfy sofa too. We don't mind sharing bathrooms, and the facilities are so clean!
Great WiFi
Great location, minute from the beach, nice sites and slabs, good amenities.

Hermoso camping, amplio, sanitarios limpios, piscina, juegos infantiles, etc.
La atención impecable.
Great place, friendy and helpful staff and wonderful location right by the beach. Thanks a lot.

Receptionist/Manager Elvira was lovely.  So helpful.  Park was in a quiet pretty area, right next to the beach with clean and adequate facilities. The pool was also lovely with slide for the kids.  Couldn’t actually find the foodie scene, but perhaps didn’t look enough.

Visited during summer, small but shady caravan site close to the beach. Bathrooms have no ventilation and are hot, the males bathrooms are smelly. The pool water is hot. Neither the games room or TV room are air-conditioned making them hot and unusable. You also have to pay for all the games in the games room.
When I brought up my concerns with staff they let me know they are aware of the bathroom, pool and games/tv room heat issues but offered no compensation.
I wouldn't recommend visiting during summer.

Parked up here with our campervan for one night. Very friendly, helpful staff. Cyclone Jasper was close by so power went out just after dark, staff very helpful and reassuring guests through this and in providing advice on travelling onwards in lieu of the potential cyclone. Power restored after a few hours! Great amenities, plenty of showers/toilets for size of park kept in great condition.

Lovely little place right on the beach with a great little pool and waterslides. My only call out is that the park is very pokey, and hard to navigate with a van, and with quite small sites. We were here in the off season, and it was hard enough then, I'd hesitate to visit in the on season with a big van. Beautiful gardens, decent amenities and wonderful location.
Buen lugar para quedarse, zonas comunes amplias y limpias. La playa muy bonita, pero solo puedes bañarte en la zona acotada para evitar las medusas.
Camping bien aménagé au bord de la plage
Lovely park opposite beach, great pool ,very clean and well maintained with a great cafe at entrance of park with good food also licenced
We camped and loved it. The pool is great

We loved our stay here, especially the staff were so helpful and friendly (shout out to Elvira ). The room was clean, roomy and had all the amenities we needed. We didn't like the location as it was too far from the town of mission beach but that is a personal choice. Just to beware there is no public transport here but you can take taxis.

We stayed for 5 nights and it was just amazing! after coming all the way from Melbourne it was a great final stop before heading to Cairns!
Staff is great and very helpful and they take so much care of the park, so beautiful! my kids loved the pool and playground! Plenty other kids to play.

Great for families!

We'll definitly come back, if we have the chance!

I would like to say the staff were lovely and welcoming... always with a smile and a laugh....I stayed in a tent...and there was lots of shade that is important....and saw the local cassowary, goanna and wallabies....it was very peaceful and enjoyable... definitely will go back

Very easy check in experience and the spa villa was good value for a two bedroom. It is a little outdated however and the bedrooms both have doors to the bathroom, which, unless you are super close with the person/s in the other room, it makes it a bit awkward.
Freundliche Mitarbeiter und ein wirklich guter Campingplatz! Die Badezimmer waren zu jeder Zeit sauber! Auch die Lage ist top!
Stopped for Lunch. Fresh local caught mackeral and home style chips. Beach setting and views of Dunk Island...pretty dam good!

Unpowered site
Personnel très sympa
Douches et wc un peu vieux mais en bon fonctionnement
Arrived late in the evening after check in was closed, keys and instructions were left in an envelope at the reception for us, golden star from me!

I stayed with my dog in our tent.
Beach directly across the road, with kids playground, amenities, basketball court, seating areas, dog beach offleash approx 3 km up the road.
Has cooking facilities with a big fridge for guests to store, food and drinks in.
2 amenities blocks plus laundry rooms, pool, tennis court, daily cleaning of public areas used, on top of any maintained required.
Quiet place, will definitely be staying again.
Staff were courteous and welcoming, kiosk has drinks, ice blocks and some grocery needs
Great location for a break. Friendly staff and close to the beach.

The  hottest with the mostest!
Alvira is awesome, she made us  very welcome, golf buggy tour to select site.
The sites are tight for a big van. But otherwise terrific. Water disappeared quickly after rain.
Toilets recently renovated and spotless.
Our favourite park
A good CP. new amenities about to open. New pool, looks good. No screaming children here at this time, how good is that👍

Stayed 1 night in a caravan , sites are very small , their was mud everywhere, I understand they have had a lot of rain , but their was large wheel marks on every site , no lights around the park at night, needs a lot of maintenance, cleaning around the sites, for $69 powered site a night , very over priced ,

This park shouldn't be more than three stars. Back part of the park is muddy without proper drainage amenities are outdated. The only good thing about this place is close to the beach. If this caravan park would be anywhere inland it would be rated 3- 3.5 stars and is very overpriced at $67 night for muddy place where you need gumboots to get out of caravan.
Great spot, great location. Right on the beach.

We booked 4 months in advance for a powered van site. They put us in an unpowered site that was inches deep in water after some rain. It flooded because they have done no drainage works and the site is in a depression. All our neighbours sites also flooded for the same reasons There are heaps better places to stay in Mission, I'd give this one a big miss.
Yeah it needs an update, which is coming.  Swampy if wet and it the tropics its almost always wet.  Still haven't missed a year in the last 10.

Just a great way to stay
Couldn't ask for anything more

Sites are narrow and small but you can cope with it. Park subject to flooding in heavy rain. Apart from that great Office and Ground Staff willing to bend over backwards to lend a hand. This is the pick of the Parks in Mission Beach. Away from the hordes and traffic.

Völlig in die Jahre gekommen und überteuert. Sanitäranlagen alt und dreckig. Baustelle auf dem Campingplatz. Super teuer für das, was geboten wird. Aber gute Lage für einen Ausflug nach magnetic Island.
